name: webvia-ui-to-code
description: Agentic framework for converting UI designs to code with verification. Triggers: UI to code generation, design implementation, web component synthesis, interactive UI building, design verification, automated development.
paperTitle: WebVIA: A Web-based Vision-Language Agentic Framework for Interactive and Verifiable UI-to-Code Generation
content:
# WebVIA: A Web-based Vision-Language Agentic Framework for Interactive and Verifiable UI-to-Code Generation ## Core Insight WebVIA transforms static UI designs into executable code through an agentic loop that combines vision understanding, language reasoning, and interactive verification. Rather than one-shot conversion, this framework iteratively generates code, renders the output, compares rendered results against the original design, and refines based on visual discrepancies. This closes the perception-execution gap common in UI generation by treating the design itself as a verification signal. ## Architecture/Implementation ```python import json from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple, Any from dataclasses import dataclass from enum import Enum class UIElementType(Enum): """Supported UI element types.""" BUTTON = "button" TEXT_INPUT = "text_input" DROPDOWN = "dropdown" CHECKBOX = "checkbox" TEXT_LABEL = "text_label" IMAGE = "image" CONTAINER = "container" GRID = "grid" MODAL = "modal" @dataclass class UIElement: """Parsed UI element from design.""" element_id: str type: UIElementType label: Optional[str] position: Tuple[float, float] # (x, y) in normalized coords size: Tuple[float, float] # (width, height) in normalized coords style: Dict[str, str] children: List['UIElement'] properties: Dict[str, Any] @dataclass class DesignImage: """Input design image.""" image_path: str width: int height: int ui_elements: List[UIElement] @dataclass class GeneratedCode: """Generated HTML/CSS/JS code.""" html: str css: str javascript: str component_structure: Dict @dataclass class VerificationResult: """Result of comparing generated code with original design.""" visual_similarity: float # 0-1 similarity score element_coverage: float # Percentage of elements rendered layout_accuracy: float # Layout correctness style_accuracy: float # CSS accuracy discrepancies: List[Dict] # List of visual differences recommendations: List[str] # Improvement suggestions class UIDesignParser: """Parses UI design images to extract elements.""" def __init__(self, vision_model): self.vision_model = vision_model def parse_design(self, design_image: DesignImage) -> List[UIElement]: """Extract UI elements from design image.""" # Simulate vision model parsing elements = self._detect_elements(design_image) elements = self._classify_elements(elements) elements = self._extract_styles(elements, design_image) elements = self._build_hierarchy(elements) return elements def _detect_elements(self, design_image: DesignImage) -> List[Dict]: """Detect element bounding boxes in image.""" # Simulated detection detections = [ { 'bbox': (0.1, 0.1, 0.3, 0.15), 'confidence': 0.95 }, { 'bbox': (0.1, 0.3, 0.9, 0.5), 'confidence': 0.92 } ] return detections def _classify_elements(self, detections: List[Dict]) -> List[Dict]: """Classify element types using vision model.""" for det in detections: det['type'] = UIElementType.BUTTON # Simulated classification det['label'] = 'Button' return detections def _extract_styles( self, elements: List[Dict], design_image: DesignImage ) -> List[Dict]: """Extract visual properties (colors, fonts, etc.).""" for elem in elements: elem['style'] = { 'background_color': '#007BFF', 'text_color': '#FFFFFF', 'font_size': '16px', 'border_radius': '4px' } return elements def _build_hierarchy(self, elements: List[Dict]) -> List[UIElement]: """Build parent-child relationships.""" ui_elements = [] for elem_dict in elements: ui_elem = UIElement( element_id=f"elem_{len(ui_elements)}", type=elem_dict.get('type', UIElementType.CONTAINER), label=elem_dict.get('label'), position=elem_dict['bbox'][:2], size=elem_dict['bbox'][2:], style=elem_dict.get('style', {}), children=[], properties={} ) ui_elements.append(ui_elem) return ui_elements class CodeGenerator: """Generates HTML/CSS/JS from UI elements.""" def __init__(self, language_model): self.language_model = language_model def generate(self, ui_elements: List[UIElement]) -> GeneratedCode: """Generate code from UI structure.""" html = self._generate_html(ui_elements) css = self._generate_css(ui_elements) javascript = self._generate_javascript(ui_elements) return GeneratedCode( html=html, css=css, javascript=javascript, component_structure=self._build_structure_map(ui_elements) ) def _generate_html(self, ui_elements: List[UIElement]) -> str: """Generate HTML from UI elements.""" html = '\n\n\n\n' html += '\n\n\n' for elem in ui_elements: html += self._element_to_html(elem) html += '\n\n\n' return html def _element_to_html(self, elem: UIElement, indent: int = 0) -> str: """Convert single element to HTML.""" prefix = ' ' * indent if elem.type == UIElementType.BUTTON: return f'{prefix}\n' elif elem.type == UIElementType.TEXT_INPUT: return f'{prefix}\n' elif elem.type == UIElementType.TEXT_LABEL: return f'{prefix}\n' elif elem.type == UIElementType.CONTAINER: html = f'{prefix}
\n' for child in elem.children: html += self._element_to_html(child, indent + 1) html += f'{prefix}
\n' return html else: return f'{prefix}
\n' def _generate_css(self, ui_elements: List[UIElement]) -> str: """Generate CSS from UI elements.""" css = '/* Generated CSS */\n' css += 'body { margin: 0; padding: 20px; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }\n' css += '.container { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; }\n' for elem in ui_elements: css += self._element_to_css(elem) return css def _element_to_css(self, elem: UIElement) -> str: """Generate CSS for single element.""" css = f'#{elem.element_id} {{\n' # Position and size css += f' position: absolute;\n' css += f' left: {elem.position[0] * 100}%;\n' css += f' top: {elem.position[1] * 100}%;\n' css += f' width: {elem.size[0] * 100}%;\n' css += f' height: {elem.size[1] * 100}%;\n' # Styles for style_key, style_value in elem.style.items(): css_key = style_key.replace('_', '-') css += f' {css_key}: {style_value};\n' css += '}\n' return css def _generate_javascript(self, ui_elements: List[UIElement]) -> str: """Generate JavaScript for interactivity.""" js = '// Generated JavaScript\n' js += 'document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {\n' for elem in ui_elements: if elem.type == UIElementType.BUTTON: js += f' document.getElementById("{elem.element_id}").addEventListener("click", function() {{\n' js += f' console.log("Button {elem.element_id} clicked");\n' js += f' }});\n' js += '});\n' return js def _build_structure_map(self, ui_elements: List[UIElement]) -> Dict: """Create component hierarchy map.""" return {elem.element_id: elem for elem in ui_elements} class CodeRenderer: """Renders generated code to visual output.""" def __init__(self): self.rendered_elements = {} def render(self, code: GeneratedCode) -> Dict: """Render HTML/CSS/JS to visual representation.""" # Parse HTML structure html_tree = self._parse_html(code.html) # Apply CSS rules styled_elements = self._apply_styles(html_tree, code.css) # Simulate rendering rendered_output = self._simulate_render(styled_elements) return rendered_output def _parse_html(self, html: str) -> Dict: """Parse HTML string to tree.""" # Simplified parsing return {'structure': 'parsed'} def _apply_styles(self, html_tree: Dict, css: str) -> Dict: """Apply CSS to HTML elements.""" return {'styled': 'elements'} def _simulate_render(self, styled_elements: Dict) -> Dict: """Simulate rendering to pixels.""" return { 'width': 1024, 'height': 768, 'elements': styled_elements } class DesignVerifier: """Compares generated code with original design.""" def __init__(self, vision_model): self.vision_model = vision_model def verify( self, original_design: DesignImage, rendered_output: Dict, generated_elements: List[UIElement] ) -> VerificationResult: """Verify generated code matches original design.""" # Visual similarity (using image comparison) visual_similarity = self._compute_visual_similarity( original_design, rendered_output ) # Element coverage element_coverage = self._compute_element_coverage( original_design.ui_elements, generated_elements ) # Layout accuracy layout_accuracy = self._compute_layout_accuracy( original_design.ui_elements, generated_elements ) # Style accuracy style_accuracy = self._compute_style_accuracy( original_design.ui_elements, generated_elements ) # Identify discrepancies discrepancies = self._identify_discrepancies( original_design, generated_elements ) # Generate recommendations recommendations = self._generate_recommendations(discrepancies) return VerificationResult( visual_similarity=visual_similarity, element_coverage=element_coverage, layout_accuracy=layout_accuracy, style_accuracy=style_accuracy, discrepancies=discrepancies, recommendations=recommendations ) def _compute_visual_similarity( self, original: DesignImage, rendered: Dict ) -> float: """Compare original and rendered images.""" # Simplified similarity computation return 0.85 def _compute_element_coverage( self, original_elements: List[UIElement], generated_elements: List[UIElement] ) -> float: """Percentage of elements successfully rendered.""" if not original_elements: return 1.0 covered = len([ g for g in generated_elements if any(o.type == g.type for o in original_elements) ]) return covered / len(original_elements) def _compute_layout_accuracy( self, original_elements: List[UIElement], generated_elements: List[UIElement] ) -> float: """Measure layout correctness.""" total_distance = 0.0 for orig in original_elements: # Find closest generated element closest = min( generated_elements, key=lambda g: self._euclidean_distance( orig.position, g.position ) ) distance = self._euclidean_distance(orig.position, closest.position) total_distance += distance avg_distance = total_distance / len(original_elements) if original_elements else 0 accuracy = max(0, 1.0 - avg_distance) # Convert distance to similarity return accuracy def _compute_style_accuracy( self, original_elements: List[UIElement], generated_elements: List[UIElement] ) -> float: """Measure CSS accuracy.""" # Simplified style comparison return 0.80 def _identify_discrepancies( self, original: DesignImage, generated: List[UIElement] ) -> List[Dict]: """Find differences between original and generated.""" discrepancies = [] # Check for missing elements for orig_elem in original.ui_elements: if not any(g.type == orig_elem.type for g in generated): discrepancies.append({ 'type': 'missing_element', 'element_type': orig_elem.type.value, 'element_id': orig_elem.element_id }) return discrepancies def _generate_recommendations(self, discrepancies: List[Dict]) -> List[str]: """Generate improvement suggestions.""" recommendations = [] for disc in discrepancies: if disc['type'] == 'missing_element': recommendations.append( f"Add missing element: {disc['element_type']}" ) return recommendations def _euclidean_distance( self, pos1: Tuple[float, float], pos2: Tuple[float, float] ) -> float: """Compute distance between positions.""" return ((pos1[0] - pos2[0]) ** 2 + (pos1[1] - pos2[1]) ** 2) ** 0.5 class WebVIAAgent: """Main agentic loop for UI-to-code generation.""" def __init__( self, vision_model, language_model, max_iterations: int = 5 ): self.vision_model = vision_model self.language_model = language_model self.max_iterations = max_iterations self.parser = UIDesignParser(vision_model) self.generator = CodeGenerator(language_model) self.renderer = CodeRenderer() self.verifier = DesignVerifier(vision_model) self.iteration_history = [] def generate_from_design( self, design_image: DesignImage ) -> Tuple[GeneratedCode, List[VerificationResult]]: """Convert design to code with verification loop.""" # Step 1: Parse design print("Step 1: Parsing design...") ui_elements = self.parser.parse_design(design_image) print(f" Extracted {len(ui_elements)} UI elements") verification_results = [] current_code = None # Step 2-5: Iterative generation and refinement for iteration in range(self.max_iterations): print(f"\nIteration {iteration + 1}/{self.max_iterations}") # Generate code print(" Generating code...") current_code = self.generator.generate(ui_elements) # Render generated code print(" Rendering code...") rendered_output = self.renderer.render(current_code) # Verify against original print(" Verifying against original design...") verification = self.verifier.verify( design_image, rendered_output, ui_elements ) verification_results.append(verification) print(f" Visual similarity: {verification.visual_similarity:.1%}") print(f" Element coverage: {verification.element_coverage:.1%}") print(f" Layout accuracy: {verification.layout_accuracy:.1%}") # Check if done if verification.visual_similarity > 0.9: print("\n✓ Verification complete!") break # Refine based on feedback if verification.recommendations: print(" Refining based on feedback...") ui_elements = self._refine_elements( ui_elements, verification.discrepancies, verification.recommendations ) self.iteration_history.append({ 'iteration': iteration + 1, 'verification': verification }) return current_code, verification_results def _refine_elements( self, elements: List[UIElement], discrepancies: List[Dict], recommendations: List[str] ) -> List[UIElement]: """Refine UI elements based on verification feedback.""" # Simulate refinement using language model for disc in discrepancies: if disc['type'] == 'missing_element': # Add missing element new_elem = UIElement( element_id=f"elem_{len(elements)}", type=UIElementType[disc['element_type'].upper()], label=disc.get('element_id'), position=(0.5, 0.5), size=(0.3, 0.1), style={}, children=[], properties={} ) elements.append(new_elem) return elements def get_iteration_summary(self) -> Dict: """Get summary of iteration history.""" if not self.iteration_history: return {} final_result = self.iteration_history[-1]['verification'] return { 'total_iterations': len(self.iteration_history), 'final_visual_similarity': final_result.visual_similarity, 'final_element_coverage': final_result.element_coverage, 'final_layout_accuracy': final_result.layout_accuracy, 'convergence': len(self.iteration_history) < self.max_iterations } ``` ## Practical Guidance 1. **Design Quality Matters**: Input designs should be clear and high-contrast. Ambiguous designs lead to longer convergence and lower accuracy. 2. **Element Hierarchy**: Ensure extracted UI hierarchy correctly represents parent-child relationships. Nested containers improve CSS generation quality. 3. **Style Extraction**: Use color detection and font analysis from the original design. Pre-extract design tokens (colors, typography) for consistent styling. 4. **Verification Metrics**: Weight visual similarity higher than individual metrics. Rendering differences in padding/margins are less critical than layout structure. 5. **Convergence Tuning**: Set max_iterations based on complexity (3 for simple layouts, 7+ for complex). Monitor convergence; if not improving after 2 iterations, adjust parsing. 6. **Interactive Elements**: JavaScript generation requires understanding button positions and expected behaviors. Include context about intended interactions in design metadata. 7. **Code Quality**: Generated code is a starting point. Always allow human refinement for pixel-perfect matching and complex interactions. ## Reference - Paper: "WebVIA: A Web-based Vision-Language Agentic Framework for Interactive and Verifiable UI-to-Code Generation" - arXiv: [2511.06251](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.06251) - Published: November 13, 2025 - Key innovation: Agentic verification loop comparing rendered output against original design - Application domain: UI automation, design implementation, web development
